CustomField.description: Is it related to a possible failure of service, such as distribution: installation expected or contracted activities; order management affecting products or delivery; etc. (excluding invoicing errors)?
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Is it related to a possible failure of service, such as distribution: installation expected or contracted activities; order management affecting products or delivery; etc. (excluding invoicing errors)?
CustomField.label: Related to Failure of Service?
